name: Toon Shooting Quasar Dragon
desc:
1+ "Toon" monsters + 1 "Toon" Tuner Must first be Synchro Summoned.

For this card's Synchro Summon, you can treat 1 "Toon" monster you control as a Tuner. (Quick Effect): When your opponent activates a card or effect: You can negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card. If this card is destroyed: You can Special Summon 1 "Toon" monster from your Deck, ignoring its Summoning conditions.

You can only use each effect of "Toon Shooting Quasar Dragon" once per turn.
